snippet.title: Coronavirus India Update : India में कोरोना के हालात पर Pakistan के PM Imran Khan क्या बोले?
snippet.description:
भारत में फैले कोरोना वायरस पर पाकिस्तानी प्रधानमंत्री इमरान ख़ान ने टिप्पणी की है. उन्होंने अपने देश को चेताया कि अगर वो ना संभले तो भारत जैसे हालात बन जाएंगे. इमरान ख़ान ने ईद तक कोरोना के नियमों का कड़ाई से पालन करने की गुज़ारिश की.

#CoronaVirus #CoronaIndia #Pakistan 

Corona Virus से जुड़े और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए यहां क्लिक करें : https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=npgvIvfmNkE&list=PLYxuvEJLss6ByutcqkthikPxV3ccUkwPB

कोरोना वायरस से जुड़ी सारी प्रामाणिक ख़बरें पढ़ने के लिए क्लिक करें : https://www.bbc.com/hindi/international-51848794

ऐसे ही और दिलचस्प वीडियो देखने के लिए चैनल सब्सक्राइब ज़रूर करें-
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCN7B-QD0Qgn2boVH5Q0pOWg?disable_polymer=true

बीबीसी हिंदी से आप इन सोशल मीडिया चैनल्स पर भी जुड़ सकते हैं-

फ़ेसबुक- https://www.facebook.com/BBCnewsHindi
ट्विटर- https://twitter.com/BBCHindi
इंस्टाग्राम- https://www.instagram.com/bbchindi/

बीबीसी हिंदी का एंड्रॉयड ऐप डाउनलोड करने के लिए क्लिक करें- https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=uk.co.bbc.hindi

snippet.title: Wafa Na Raas Aayee Song Jubin Nautiyal Ft.Himansh K,Arushi N, Meet Bros|Rashmi V|Ashish P| Bhushan K
snippet.description:
Gulshan Kumar & T-Series presents Bhushan Kumar's "Wafa Na Raas Aayee" in the voice of Jubin Nautiyal, music by Meet Bros, lyrics are written by Rashmi Virag. The song features Himansh Kohli, Arushi Nishank & Rohit Suchanti. The video is directed by Ashish Panda. 
Hit 'LIKE' if you ♥ this song.

Get ready for #WafaNaRaasAayee to pinch your heart and stir your emotions.

snippet.title: Radhe: Your Most Wanted Bhai | Official Trailer | Salman Khan | Prabhu Deva | EID 2021
snippet.description:
This Eid, there will be action, drama, music and dance with Salman Khan. Presenting the Official Trailer of The Action Entertainer of the year - Radhe: Your Most Wanted Bhai.  Releasing simultaneously on multiple platforms worldwide on 13th May, 2021

#Radhe #RadheTrailer #SalmanKhan

snippet.title: "PM Sir, Please Make A Phone Call": Arvind Kejriwal On Oxygen Crisis
snippet.description:
Covid-19 News: Prime Minister Narendra Modi met with the Chief Minister of the 10 states worst hit by the deadly second wave of Covid on a day India touched a new record of 3.32 lakh Covid cases and 2,263 deaths in 24 hours. In an interaction that was live on TV, Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal highlighted the crippling oxygen crisis in hospitals in the capital. "Please sir, we need your guidance," Mr Kejriwal said to the Prime Minister.

snippet.title: MUTTON SCRAMBLED EGG | Biggest Scrambled Egg Cooking with Mutton Keema Meat | Lamb mixed Egg Recipe
snippet.description:
Today in our village we cook Scrambled Egg Omelette Recipe by adding boneless mutton meat with egg. We use the big vessel to make this biggest scrambled egg. We also use hand ground masalas to make this egg recipe yummy.

Finally, we eat these eggs with our favorite mutton recipe.

snippet.description:

snippet.title: TVF's Aspirants | Web Series | Episode 3 | Positive Approach Rakh Yaar
snippet.description:
Like the Episode? Rate us on IMDb - https://www.imdb.com/title/tt14392248/

The next Episode Releases on 28th April, when we reach 9M Subscribers.

Preparing for UPSC is challenging. It tests not only your knowledge but also your patience. It’s really important to maintain a positive approach throughout your preparation. But everyone around Abhilash notices that he lacks a positive approach in his personality, which reflects in his answers too. How will Abhilash cope with it? Will he be able to keep his approach positive?

Participate in the Unacademy Combat, a weekly scholarship test for UPSC SCE. Use code ASPIRANTS2021 to take the test and compete with peers across the country. Top rankers will also stand a chance to get up to 100% scholarship from a pool worth Rs 1 Crore.
Link - https://unacademy.com/combat/a/KSCGY

This examination season, we bring you the story of three friends who reunite to tell us all about UPSC Pre... Mains... Aur Life. 

Unacademy & The Viral Fever presents ASPIRANTS - A TVF Original Series. 

Credits:
Created by: Arunabh Kumar & Shreyansh Pandey
Directed by: Apoorv Singh Karki 
Written by: Deepesh Sumitra Jagdish 
Produced by: Arunabh Kumar 
Executive Producers: Vijay Koshy, Shreyansh Pandey, Arun Kumar 
Supervising Producers: Haider Ali, Joshna Bhat 
Associate Director: Himali Shah 
D.O.P: Georgy John, Arjun Kukreti 
Editor: Tushar Manocha 
Background Score: Tusshar Mallek 
Music: Rohit Sharma
Head of Post Production: Gaurav Rungta 
Casting: Ashish Khare & Shiv Chauhan 
Production Designer: Beeva Mahajan 
Costume Stylist: Yashika Kakkar 
Sound Design: Pranit Purao (Acoustry Private Limited)
DI Colorist: David Gabris (Futureworks Media Limited)
Head of Finance: Manish Saini

Cast: Naveen Kasturia, Shivankit Parihar, Abhilash Thapliyal, Sunny Hinduja, Namita Dubey

UPSC fact #87: 23.72% of the total UPSC Aspirants wanted to become IAS officers because they wanted to be called “Babu” so that finally someone will ask them “Mele Babu ne thana thaya?”
-The Description Guy.

#TVFAspirants​ #TVFOriginal​ #LetsCrackIt​ #UPSC​ 

This Channel is owned, operated, and managed by Contagious Online Media Network Private Limited.

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: കോവിഡ് രോഗികൾ ദിവസം 3നേരം കഴിക്കേണ്ട ഭക്ഷണം, കഴിച്ചു കൂടാത്തത് Covid Diet ഷെയർ ചെയ്യുക ഉപകാരപ്പെടും
snippet.description:
കോവിഡ് രോഗം വന്നു വീട്ടിൽ വിശ്രമിക്കുന്നവർ ദിവസവും മൂന്നു നേരവും കഴിക്കേണ്ട ഭക്ഷണം, ഭക്ഷണത്തിൽ ഉൾപ്പെടുത്തേണ്ട മസാലകൾ, കഴിക്കാൻ പാടില്ലാത്ത ഭക്ഷണങ്ങൾ.. വിശദമായി അറിയുക . 
0:00 Start
1:21 ഇന്‍ഫ്ലമേഷന്‍ കൂട്ടുന്ന ഭക്ഷണം കഴിക്കാമോ?
3:00 കഴിക്കേണ്ട സുഖന്ദവ്യഞ്ജങ്ങള്‍ ഏതെല്ലാം? എന്തു കഴിക്കരുത്?
4:00 പ്രഭാത ഭക്ഷണത്തില്‍ എന്തു ഉള്‍പെടുത്തണം? എന്തു കഴിക്കരുത്?
6:15 മാംസം എങ്ങനെ ഉണ്ടാക്കണം? എന്തു കഴിക്കരുത്?
7:00 11 മണിക്ക് എന്തു കഴിക്കണം? എന്തു കഴിക്കരുത്?
8:28 ഉച്ചഭക്ഷണം എന്തു കഴിക്കണം? എന്തു കഴിക്കരുത്?
11:00 4 മണിക്ക് എന്തു കഴിക്കണം? എന്തു കഴിക്കരുത്?
11:53 രാത്രി എന്തു കഴിക്കണം? എന്തു കഴിക്കരുത്?
13:00 എത്രമണിക്കൂര്‍ ഉറങ്ങണം?

രോഗം വന്നവർക്ക് എളുപ്പത്തിൽ ആരോഗ്യം വീണ്ടെടുക്കാനും കോവിഡ് വന്നവർക്ക് അതിനു ശേഷമുണ്ടാകുന്ന ആരോഗ്യ പ്രശ്നങ്ങളെ ഒഴിവാക്കാനും ഈ ഭക്ഷണങ്ങൾ സഹായിക്കും. . പരമാവധി ഷെയർ ചെയ്തു പ്രചരിപ്പിക്കുക. ഒരുപാടുപേർക്ക് ഉപകരിക്കും. 

For Appointments  Please Call 90 6161 5959
tags: diet chart for covid-19 patients in india
diet for covid-19 patients in india

snippet.title: സന്തോഷ് ജോർജ് കുളങ്ങരയുടെ പൈതൃക കേന്ദ്രത്തിൽ 125 - 250 വർഷം പഴക്കമുള്ള കെട്ടിടങ്ങൾ പുനഃസ്ഥാപിച്ച കഥ
snippet.description:

snippet.title: Mi 11 Ultra Unboxing & First Look - True Ultra Flagship SuperPhone - Giveaway🔥🔥🔥
snippet.description:
Enter here: https://gleam.io/YPfBy/tg-mi-11-ultra-giveaway
Namaskaar Dosto, is video mein maine aapse baat ki hai Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra 5G Smartphone ke baare mein aur share ki hai kuch details isi Mi 11 Ultra Smartphone ke baare mein aur saath hi isi Mi 11 Ultra ki ek Unboxing aur details share ki hai. Mi 11 Ultra ek flagship phone hai Xiaomi ki taraf se jaha hai 6.81" ka WQHD+ AMOLED 120Hz Display, Mi 11 Ultra 5G mein hai ek Triple Camera setup 50MP Primary Camera + 48MP Ultrawide Camera + 48MP 5x Zoom (120x Zoom) Camera ke saath mein. Mi 11 Ultra 5G mein hai 20MP Selfie Camera aur power ke liye hai liquid cooled Qualcomm Snapdragon 888 5G Processor, aur saath mein 8GB/12GB RAM LPDDR5 RAM aur 256GB/512GB UFS3.1 Storage aur saath mein 5000mAh ki Battery 67W wired/wireless charging ke saath mein jaha 10W reverse wireless charging bhi available hai. Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra 5G Smartphone mein hamare paas hai WiFi 6E, 5G multilink aur NFC option bhi available hai. Xiaomi Mi 11 Ultra phone aap mein se kisi ek lucky viewer ko milne waala hai. Mujhe umeed hai ki aapko Mi 11 Ultra 5G ki yeh unboxing video pasand aayegi.

snippet.title: KHASA AALA CHAHAR : FOOLAD (Official Video) | Ghanu Music | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021
snippet.description:
KHASA AALA CHAHAR : FOOLAD (Official Video) | Ghanu Music | New Haryanvi Songs Haryanavi 2021

FOOLAD (Official Video) Song sung by "Khasa Aala Chahar" in the praise of the best e-learning platform, Dhurina. Now, you can prepare for your upcoming competitive exams with Interactive Live lectures, Pdf notes, test series, and other study material by the best educators of the country at the most reasonable prices. 

To download the app:
https://dhurina.app.link/9friYpORDfb

Happy Learning:)

In this song music given by Ghanu Music. Label by Royal Music Factory. For More Haryanavi Songs Subscribe to Our Channel.

#Foolad #KhasaAalaChahar #RoyalMusicFactory #NewHaryanviSongHaryanavi2021

Song: Foolad फौलाद (Full Song)
Starring : Khasa Aala Chahar
Singer/Lyrics/Composer : Khasa Aala Chahar 
Follow On : https://instagram.com/khasa_aala_chahar

Music : Ghanu Music
Director : Sanju Sehrawat
Mix Master : D chandu
Dop : Satish 
Editor : Bhagirath Sharma
Makeup : Ashu Pandey
Special Thanks : Khaas Group (Mukesh, Sidharth, Pardeep, Rohit, Sumit)
Producer: Jyoti Mishra & Ashok Dedha
Publicity Design: Sumit Bamal & Sonu Rana (+91 6397537938)

Online/Digital Promotions : Navi Baadliwal
https://www.instagram.com/navibaadliwal

CEO: Jyoti Mishra
Music Label: Royal Music Factory

Enquiry Contacts of Royal Music Factory
Call on +91-9717764821

Lyrics -
Time kahan te na aave laana pdega
Yo mehnat ka ghadiya bjana pdega
Tne khud ne se bera chuha se ya sher
Tne dunia ti krke dikhana pdega

Tne mehnat te bhaag jgaana pdega
Re tu khud k swal ka jvaab h
Re utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h 
utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h 

Garib ghar me tu jaama tera koi dosh na 
Marga grib dosh laag jaavega
Kalla ghar te likad kuchh kar de unique 
Teri gel me jamaana saara laag jaavega 
Bina tili khasa aale aag laa jaavega 
Met de jo utthe saali khaaj h 
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h

Foolad ki olaad h ( 7 ) 

Dekhe sapne je tne jor tuhe laavega
Ya tu dekh k halat khali betth jaavega
Re ya dunia samnder iski tu machhli jor de na koi or khaa jaavega
Raakh khud pe yakin daav laa jaavega
Baad iske ya jindagi aabad h 
Utth jaag tu foolad h 
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h 
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h

Hole takda tu chot maari jaavegi 
Tera hatt ga je dyaan baaji haari jaavegi 
Dosh time ne na deve
Game changer se tu
Re ya na palat k na baari aavegi
Ho tere faisle karan ki bhi baari aavegi
Liye badle jo jo tere yaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h
Utth jaag tu foolad ki olaad h

Stay Connected with us on:

Subscribe Our Channel on YouTube:
https://goo.gl/y3e5hN

Like us on Facebook:
https://fb.me/royalmusicfactory

Follow us on Twitter:
https://twitter.com/royalmusicfact

Follow us on Instagram:
https://www.instagram.com/royalmusicfactory

Royal Music Factory is a Delhi based film production and label music company. All the music lovers subscribe us for Haryanvi Songs, Punjabi Songs, Hindi Songs and Comedy Videos.

Lyrics:
THE WEEKND
I saw you dancing in a crowded room
You look so happy when I’m not with you
But then you saw me caught you by surprise
A single teardrop falling from your eyes
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
You could’ve asked my why I broke your heart
You could’ve told me that you fell apart
But you walked past me like I wasn’t there
And just pretended like you didn’t care
I don’t know why I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Take me back cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another…
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
ARIANA GRANDE
Met you once under a Pisces moon
I kept my distance ‘cause I know that you
Don’t like when I’m with nobody else
I couldn’t help it, I put you through hell
I don’t know why I run away, oh boy
I make you cry when I run away
Boy take me back ‘cause I wanna stay
Save your tears for another
I realize that it’s much too late
And you deserve someone better
THE WEEKND & ARIANA GRANDE
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
I don’t know why, I run away
I make you cry when I run away
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day
Save your tears for another day

snippet.title: Thee Veeran | Hiphop Tamizha Documentary
snippet.description:
Narrated by Hiphop Tamizha, this documentary sheds light upon the life of Tamil Nadu Fire Fighters of India. This voyage has changed our perspective on life. At dire times like this, amidst the pandemic, we wish this effort of ours will sow seeds of hope upon the barren souls who are feeling downcast. There is always hope if we know where to look for. In our case, we found that in our year-long journey filled with Passion, Bravery and Sacrifice. Witness the journey unfold.

Writer-Director - Hiphop Tamizha
Music Producer by  HiphopTamizha
Executive Producer - Ashwanth
Singer - Nivas 
Background Score Programming - Fazil sha
Sound Engineer - Nikhil Mathews
DOP - Arjun Raja D.F.Tech
DOP Assistant - Dani Pops
Editor - Deepak.S.Dwaraknath
Colorist - Siva
Design - Nxtgen Studio
Promo Cut - Krishna
Social Media Manager - SriramSurathKumar
Hiphop Tamizha Staff - Parthiban, Nishanth 

In association with Tamil Nadu Fire Rescue & Services 

A Tamizhanda Movement Initiative.

snippet.title: Indore: IAF's C-17 ferries oxygen tankers to Jamnagar
snippet.description: Oxygen tankers airlifted from Indore by Indian Air Force's  C-17 aircraft to ramp up the supply to hospitals. The tankers will be ferried to Jamnagar for oxygen filling. Many states are facing a shortage of Oxygen in the country that has led to the death of many covid patients.

snippet.title: THE CONJURING: THE DEVIL MADE ME DO IT – Official Trailer
snippet.description:
True horror returns. Based on the case files of Ed and Lorraine Warren. #TheConjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It, in theaters and HBO Max June 4.
 
https://www.facebook.com/TheConjuringMovie
https://twitter.com/TheConjuring
https://www.instagram.com/theconjuring
https://www.theconjuringmovie.com
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” reveals a chilling story of terror, murder and unknown evil that shocked even experienced real-life paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren. One of the most sensational cases from their files, it starts with a fight for the soul of a young boy, then takes them beyond anything they’d ever seen before, to mark the first time in U.S. history that a murder suspect would claim demonic possession as a defense.
 
Vera Farmiga and Patrick Wilson return to star as Lorraine and Ed Warren, under the direction of Michael Chaves (“The Curse of La Llorona”). The film also stars Ruairi O’Connor (Starz’ “The Spanish Princess”), Sarah Catherine Hook (Hulu’s “Monsterland”) and Julian Hilliard (the series “Penny Dreadful: city of Angels” and “The Haunting of Hill House”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” was produced by James Wan and Peter Safran, who have collaborated on all the “Conjuring” Universe films. Chaves directed from a screenplay by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick (“The Conjuring 2,” “Aquaman”), story by James Wan & David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, based on characters created by Chad Hayes & Carey W. Hayes. Serving as executive producers were Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott and Michelle Morrissey.
 
The behind-the-scenes creative team reunited “Conjuring” Universe contributors, including director of photography Michael Burgess, production designer Jennifer Spence, costume designer Leah Butler and composer Joseph Bishara, along with the director’s editor from “The Curse of La Llorona,” Peter Gvozdas, and editor Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” is the seventh film in the “Conjuring” Universe, the largest horror franchise in history, which has grossed more than $1.8 billion worldwide. It includes the first two “Conjuring” films, as well as “Annabelle” and “Annabelle: Creation,” “The Nun,” and “Annabelle Comes Home.”
 
New Line Cinema presents An Atomic Monster/A Peter Safran Production, “The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It.” It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures. The film opens in theatres and IMAX nationwide on June 4, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release. The film is rated R for terror, violence and some disturbing images.

Hayes. Serving as executive producers were Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott and Michelle Morrissey.
 
The behind-the-scenes creative team reunited “Conjuring” Universe contributors, including director of photography Michael Burgess, production designer Jennifer Spence, costume designer Leah Butler and composer Joseph Bishara, along with the director’s editor from “The Curse of La Llorona,” Peter Gvozdas, and editor Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” is the seventh film in the “Conjuring” Universe, the largest horror franchise in history, which has grossed more than $1.8 billion worldwide. It includes the first two “Conjuring” films, as well as “Annabelle” and “Annabelle: Creation,” “The Nun,” and “Annabelle Comes Home.”
 
New Line Cinema presents An Atomic Monster/A Peter Safran Production, “The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It.” It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures. The film opens in theatres and IMAX nationwide on June 4, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release. The film is rated R for terror, violence and some disturbing images.

en.title: THE CONJURING: THE DEVIL MADE ME DO IT – Official Trailer
en.description:
True horror returns. Based on the case files of Ed and Lorraine Warren. #TheConjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It, in theaters and HBO Max June 4.
 
https://www.facebook.com/TheConjuringMovie
https://twitter.com/TheConjuring
https://www.instagram.com/theconjuring
https://www.theconjuringmovie.com
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” reveals a chilling story of terror, murder and unknown evil that shocked even experienced real-life paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren. One of the most sensational cases from their files, it starts with a fight for the soul of a young boy, then takes them beyond anything they’d ever seen before, to mark the first time in U.S. history that a murder suspect would claim demonic possession as a defense.
 
Vera Farmiga and Patrick Wilson return to star as Lorraine and Ed Warren, under the direction of Michael Chaves (“The Curse of La Llorona”). The film also stars Ruairi O’Connor (Starz’ “The Spanish Princess”), Sarah Catherine Hook (Hulu’s “Monsterland”) and Julian Hilliard (the series “Penny Dreadful: city of Angels” and “The Haunting of Hill House”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” was produced by James Wan and Peter Safran, who have collaborated on all the “Conjuring” Universe films. Chaves directed from a screenplay by David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick (“The Conjuring 2,” “Aquaman”), story by James Wan & David Leslie Johnson-McGoldrick, based on characters created by Chad Hayes & Carey W. Hayes. Serving as executive producers were Richard Brener, Dave Neustadter, Victoria Palmeri, Michael Clear, Judson Scott and Michelle Morrissey.
 
The behind-the-scenes creative team reunited “Conjuring” Universe contributors, including director of photography Michael Burgess, production designer Jennifer Spence, costume designer Leah Butler and composer Joseph Bishara, along with the director’s editor from “The Curse of La Llorona,” Peter Gvozdas, and editor Christian Wagner (“Furious 7”).
 
“The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It” is the seventh film in the “Conjuring” Universe, the largest horror franchise in history, which has grossed more than $1.8 billion worldwide. It includes the first two “Conjuring” films, as well as “Annabelle” and “Annabelle: Creation,” “The Nun,” and “Annabelle Comes Home.”
 
New Line Cinema presents An Atomic Monster/A Peter Safran Production, “The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It.” It will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures. The film opens in theatres and IMAX nationwide on June 4, 2021 and will be available on HBO Max for 31 days from theatrical release. The film is rated R for terror, violence and some disturbing images.

snippet.title: Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 12 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 23rd Apr 21
snippet.description:
Khuda Aur Mohabbat - Season 3 - Ep 12 Teaser - Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints - 23rd April 21

Your favourite Pakistani dramas are just a click away! Subscribe and hit the bell icon to never miss a video from our amazing YouTube channel that is now available in the USA https://bit.ly/30JSSPr

Khuda Aur Mohabbat Digitally Presented by Happilac Paints

Farhad and Mahi hail from completely different economic and cultural backgrounds. Mahi, who comes from an influential family, must adhere to the conventions and requirements of her family’s class despite her true jovial nature. Farhad on the other hand belongs to a small town and is instantly drawn to the charismatic Mahi and soon forsakes everything for her.
Though Mahi appreciates Farhad’s efforts, she does not have the same feelings for him. In the quest to win Mahi’s heart, Farhad finds himself forming a special bond with his creator and becomes a devotee of love. In this classic love story two star-crossed souls struggle to fight for their love. Will destiny bring them together? Will the boundaries of class and society be broken? Or is Farhad destined to live the life of a devotee?
Written by: Hashim Nadeem Khan
Directed by: Syed Wajahat Hussain
Produced by: Abdullah Kadwani & Asad Qureshi
Production House: 7th Sky Entertainment
Singer: Rahat Fateh Ali Khan & Nish Asher
Lyrics: Qamar Nashad
Composer: Naveed Nashad

snippet.title: Daily Updates.April 25 Sunday.Rain.bpl ration card.
snippet.description:
Daily Updates.April 25 Sunday.Rain.bpl ration card.


വേനൽ മഴയ്ക്ക് മുന്നോടിയായുള്ള  ഇടിമിന്നൽ അപകടകാരികൾ ആണ്. മനുഷ്യ ജീവനും വൈദ്യുത ചാലകങ്ങളുമായി ബന്ധിപ്പിച്ചിട്ടുള്ള വീട്ടുപകരണങ്ങൾക്കും വലിയ നാശനഷ്ടം ഉണ്ടാക്കുന്നു. കനത്ത ഇടിമിന്നലും വേനൽ മഴയും കാറ്റും വ്യാപകമായതോടെ  മരങ്ങൾ വീണും  വൈദ്യുതിക്കമ്പികളും പോസ്റ്റും പൊട്ടിവീണ് അപകടങ്ങൾ ഉണ്ടാകാനും  സാധ്യത കൂടുതലാണ്.  

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലിന്റെ ആദ്യ ലക്ഷണം കണ്ടുകഴിഞ്ഞാൽ ഉടൻ തന്നെ സുരക്ഷിതമായ കെട്ടിടത്തിനുള്ളിലേക്ക്‌ മാറുക.

🗲 മഴക്കാറ് കാണുമ്പോൾ തുണികൾ എടുക്കാൻ ടെറസിലേക്കോ, മുറ്റത്തക്കോ ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത് പോകരുത്.

🗲 ഒരു കാരണവശാലും ജലാശയങ്ങളില്‍ ഇറങ്ങരുത്. 

🗲 ഗൃഹോപകരണങ്ങളുടെ വൈദ്യുതി ബന്ധം വിഛേദിക്കുക.

🗲 ജനലുകളും വാതിലുകളും  അടച്ചിടുക.

🗲 ലോഹ വസ്തുക്കളുടെ സ്പർശനമോ സാമീപ്യമോ പാടില്ല. വൈദ്യുതി ഉപകരണങ്ങളുടെ സാമീപ്യവും  
ഒഴിവാക്കുക.

🗲 ടെലിഫോൺ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നത് ഒഴിവാക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത്‌ കുളിക്കുന്നത്‌ ഒഴിവാക്കുക.

🗲 കഴിയുന്നത്രയും വീടിന്റെ  ഭിത്തിയിലോ തറയിലോ നേരിട്ട് സ്പർശിക്കാതിരിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത്‌ ടെറസ്സിലോ മറ്റ്‌ ഉയരമുള്ള സ്ഥലങ്ങളിലോ വൃക്ഷ കൊമ്പിലോ ഇരിക്കുന്നത്‌ അപകടകരമാണ്‌.

🗲 വീടിനു പുറത്താണങ്കിൽ വൃക്ഷങ്ങളുടെ ചുവട്ടിൽ നിൽക്കരുത്‌.

🗲 വാഹനത്തിനുള്ളിൽ ആണങ്കിൽ തുറസ്സായ സ്ഥലത്ത്‌ നിർത്തി, ലോഹ ഭാഗങ്ങളിൽ സ്പർശിക്കാതെ ഇരിക്കണം.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നൽ ഉണ്ടാകുമ്പോൾ ജലാശയത്തിൽ ഇറങ്ങുവാൻ പാടില്ല.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയം പുറത്ത്‌ അയയിൽ കിടക്കുന്ന നനഞ്ഞ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ എടുക്കാതിരിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലിൽനിന്ന് സുരക്ഷിതമാക്കാൻ കെട്ടിടങ്ങൾക്കു മുകളിൽ മിന്നൽ രക്ഷാ ചാലകം സ്ഥാപിക്കാം. 

🗲 വൈദ്യുതോപകരണങ്ങളുടെ സുരക്ഷക്കായി സർജ്ജ്‌ പ്രോട്ടക്ടര്‍ ഘടിപ്പിക്കാം.

🗲 വളര്‍ത്തു മൃഗങ്ങളെ തുറസായ സ്ഥലത്ത് ഈ സമയത്ത് കെട്ടരുത്. തുറസ്സായ സ്ഥലത്ത് കെട്ടിയവയെ ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ളപ്പോ മാറ്റിക്കെട്ടാനായി പുറത്തിറങ്ങരുത്. 

🗲 വാഹനങ്ങളിലുളളവര്‍ സുരക്ഷിതമായ സ്ഥലങ്ങള്‍ ലഭിക്കാത്തപക്ഷം വാഹനത്തിനുളളില്‍ തന്നെ ഇരിക്കണം. 

🗲  തുറസായ സ്ഥലത്താണെങ്കില്‍ പാദങ്ങള്‍ ചേര്‍ത്തുവച്ച് തല കാല്‍മുട്ടുകള്‍ക്കിടയില്‍ ഒതുക്കി ഉരുണ്ട രൂപത്തില്‍ ഇരിക്കുക. തറയില്‍ കിടക്കരുത്. 

🗲 മിന്നല്‍ ദൃശ്യമാകുന്നില്ലെങ്കില്‍പോലും ആകാശം മേഘാവൃതമാണെങ്കില്‍ സുരക്ഷാ നിര്‍ദേശങ്ങള്‍ പാലിക്കുക.

🗲 വൈദ്യുതി സംബന്ധമായ പരാതികൾക്ക് 1912 അല്ലെങ്കിൽ  0471 2555544 വിളിക്കുക. 9496001912 എന്ന വാട്സാപ്പ് നമ്പർ വഴിയും പരാതിപ്പെടാവുന്നതാണ്.

മിന്നലിന്റെ ആഘാതത്താൽ പൊള്ളൽ ഏൽക്കുകയോ കാഴ്ച്ചയോ കേൾവിയോ നഷ്ടമാവുകയോ ഹൃദയാഘാതം സംഭവിക്കയോ ചെയ്യാൻ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട് . മിന്നലാഘാതം ഏറ്റ ആളിന്റെ ശരീരത്തിൽ വൈദ്യുത പ്രവാഹം ഇല്ല എന്ന് മനസ്സിലാക്കണം. അതിനാൽ മിന്നലേറ്റ ആളിന്‌ പ്രഥമ ശുശ്രൂഷ നൽകുവാൻ മടിക്കരുത്‌. മിന്നൽ ഏറ്റാല്‍ ആദ്യ മുപ്പത്‌ സെക്കൻഡ് ജീവൻ രക്ഷിക്കാനുള്ള സുവർണ്ണ നിമിഷങ്ങളാണ്‌.

localized.title: Daily Updates.April 25 Sunday.Rain.bpl ration card.
localized.description:
Daily Updates.April 25 Sunday.Rain.bpl ration card.


വേനൽ മഴയ്ക്ക് മുന്നോടിയായുള്ള  ഇടിമിന്നൽ അപകടകാരികൾ ആണ്. മനുഷ്യ ജീവനും വൈദ്യുത ചാലകങ്ങളുമായി ബന്ധിപ്പിച്ചിട്ടുള്ള വീട്ടുപകരണങ്ങൾക്കും വലിയ നാശനഷ്ടം ഉണ്ടാക്കുന്നു. കനത്ത ഇടിമിന്നലും വേനൽ മഴയും കാറ്റും വ്യാപകമായതോടെ  മരങ്ങൾ വീണും  വൈദ്യുതിക്കമ്പികളും പോസ്റ്റും പൊട്ടിവീണ് അപകടങ്ങൾ ഉണ്ടാകാനും  സാധ്യത കൂടുതലാണ്.  

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലിന്റെ ആദ്യ ലക്ഷണം കണ്ടുകഴിഞ്ഞാൽ ഉടൻ തന്നെ സുരക്ഷിതമായ കെട്ടിടത്തിനുള്ളിലേക്ക്‌ മാറുക.

🗲 മഴക്കാറ് കാണുമ്പോൾ തുണികൾ എടുക്കാൻ ടെറസിലേക്കോ, മുറ്റത്തക്കോ ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത് പോകരുത്.

🗲 ഒരു കാരണവശാലും ജലാശയങ്ങളില്‍ ഇറങ്ങരുത്. 

🗲 ഗൃഹോപകരണങ്ങളുടെ വൈദ്യുതി ബന്ധം വിഛേദിക്കുക.

🗲 ജനലുകളും വാതിലുകളും  അടച്ചിടുക.

🗲 ലോഹ വസ്തുക്കളുടെ സ്പർശനമോ സാമീപ്യമോ പാടില്ല. വൈദ്യുതി ഉപകരണങ്ങളുടെ സാമീപ്യവും  
ഒഴിവാക്കുക.

🗲 ടെലിഫോൺ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നത് ഒഴിവാക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത്‌ കുളിക്കുന്നത്‌ ഒഴിവാക്കുക.

🗲 കഴിയുന്നത്രയും വീടിന്റെ  ഭിത്തിയിലോ തറയിലോ നേരിട്ട് സ്പർശിക്കാതിരിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത്‌ ടെറസ്സിലോ മറ്റ്‌ ഉയരമുള്ള സ്ഥലങ്ങളിലോ വൃക്ഷ കൊമ്പിലോ ഇരിക്കുന്നത്‌ അപകടകരമാണ്‌.

🗲 വീടിനു പുറത്താണങ്കിൽ വൃക്ഷങ്ങളുടെ ചുവട്ടിൽ നിൽക്കരുത്‌.

🗲 വാഹനത്തിനുള്ളിൽ ആണങ്കിൽ തുറസ്സായ സ്ഥലത്ത്‌ നിർത്തി, ലോഹ ഭാഗങ്ങളിൽ സ്പർശിക്കാതെ ഇരിക്കണം.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നൽ ഉണ്ടാകുമ്പോൾ ജലാശയത്തിൽ ഇറങ്ങുവാൻ പാടില്ല.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയം പുറത്ത്‌ അയയിൽ കിടക്കുന്ന നനഞ്ഞ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ എടുക്കാതിരിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലിൽനിന്ന് സുരക്ഷിതമാക്കാൻ കെട്ടിടങ്ങൾക്കു മുകളിൽ മിന്നൽ രക്ഷാ ചാലകം സ്ഥാപിക്കാം. 

🗲 വൈദ്യുതോപകരണങ്ങളുടെ സുരക്ഷക്കായി സർജ്ജ്‌ പ്രോട്ടക്ടര്‍ ഘടിപ്പിക്കാം.

🗲 വളര്‍ത്തു മൃഗങ്ങളെ തുറസായ സ്ഥലത്ത് ഈ സമയത്ത് കെട്ടരുത്. തുറസ്സായ സ്ഥലത്ത് കെട്ടിയവയെ ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ളപ്പോ മാറ്റിക്കെട്ടാനായി പുറത്തിറങ്ങരുത്. 

🗲 വാഹനങ്ങളിലുളളവര്‍ സുരക്ഷിതമായ സ്ഥലങ്ങള്‍ ലഭിക്കാത്തപക്ഷം വാഹനത്തിനുളളില്‍ തന്നെ ഇരിക്കണം. 

🗲  തുറസായ സ്ഥലത്താണെങ്കില്‍ പാദങ്ങള്‍ ചേര്‍ത്തുവച്ച് തല കാല്‍മുട്ടുകള്‍ക്കിടയില്‍ ഒതുക്കി ഉരുണ്ട രൂപത്തില്‍ ഇരിക്കുക. തറയില്‍ കിടക്കരുത്. 

🗲 മിന്നല്‍ ദൃശ്യമാകുന്നില്ലെങ്കില്‍പോലും ആകാശം മേഘാവൃതമാണെങ്കില്‍ സുരക്ഷാ നിര്‍ദേശങ്ങള്‍ പാലിക്കുക.

🗲 വൈദ്യുതി സംബന്ധമായ പരാതികൾക്ക് 1912 അല്ലെങ്കിൽ  0471 2555544 വിളിക്കുക. 9496001912 എന്ന വാട്സാപ്പ് നമ്പർ വഴിയും പരാതിപ്പെടാവുന്നതാണ്.

മിന്നലിന്റെ ആഘാതത്താൽ പൊള്ളൽ ഏൽക്കുകയോ കാഴ്ച്ചയോ കേൾവിയോ നഷ്ടമാവുകയോ ഹൃദയാഘാതം സംഭവിക്കയോ ചെയ്യാൻ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട് . മിന്നലാഘാതം ഏറ്റ ആളിന്റെ ശരീരത്തിൽ വൈദ്യുത പ്രവാഹം ഇല്ല എന്ന് മനസ്സിലാക്കണം. അതിനാൽ മിന്നലേറ്റ ആളിന്‌ പ്രഥമ ശുശ്രൂഷ നൽകുവാൻ മടിക്കരുത്‌. മിന്നൽ ഏറ്റാല്‍ ആദ്യ മുപ്പത്‌ സെക്കൻഡ് ജീവൻ രക്ഷിക്കാനുള്ള സുവർണ്ണ നിമിഷങ്ങളാണ്‌.

Daily Updates.April 25 Sunday.Rain.bpl ration card.


വേനൽ മഴയ്ക്ക് മുന്നോടിയായുള്ള  ഇടിമിന്നൽ അപകടകാരികൾ ആണ്. മനുഷ്യ ജീവനും വൈദ്യുത ചാലകങ്ങളുമായി ബന്ധിപ്പിച്ചിട്ടുള്ള വീട്ടുപകരണങ്ങൾക്കും വലിയ നാശനഷ്ടം ഉണ്ടാക്കുന്നു. കനത്ത ഇടിമിന്നലും വേനൽ മഴയും കാറ്റും വ്യാപകമായതോടെ  മരങ്ങൾ വീണും  വൈദ്യുതിക്കമ്പികളും പോസ്റ്റും പൊട്ടിവീണ് അപകടങ്ങൾ ഉണ്ടാകാനും  സാധ്യത കൂടുതലാണ്.  

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലിന്റെ ആദ്യ ലക്ഷണം കണ്ടുകഴിഞ്ഞാൽ ഉടൻ തന്നെ സുരക്ഷിതമായ കെട്ടിടത്തിനുള്ളിലേക്ക്‌ മാറുക.

🗲 മഴക്കാറ് കാണുമ്പോൾ തുണികൾ എടുക്കാൻ ടെറസിലേക്കോ, മുറ്റത്തക്കോ ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത് പോകരുത്.

🗲 ഒരു കാരണവശാലും ജലാശയങ്ങളില്‍ ഇറങ്ങരുത്. 

🗲 ഗൃഹോപകരണങ്ങളുടെ വൈദ്യുതി ബന്ധം വിഛേദിക്കുക.

🗲 ജനലുകളും വാതിലുകളും  അടച്ചിടുക.

🗲 ലോഹ വസ്തുക്കളുടെ സ്പർശനമോ സാമീപ്യമോ പാടില്ല. വൈദ്യുതി ഉപകരണങ്ങളുടെ സാമീപ്യവും  
ഒഴിവാക്കുക.

🗲 ടെലിഫോൺ ഉപയോഗിക്കുന്നത് ഒഴിവാക്കാൻ ശ്രമിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത്‌ കുളിക്കുന്നത്‌ ഒഴിവാക്കുക.

🗲 കഴിയുന്നത്രയും വീടിന്റെ  ഭിത്തിയിലോ തറയിലോ നേരിട്ട് സ്പർശിക്കാതിരിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയത്ത്‌ ടെറസ്സിലോ മറ്റ്‌ ഉയരമുള്ള സ്ഥലങ്ങളിലോ വൃക്ഷ കൊമ്പിലോ ഇരിക്കുന്നത്‌ അപകടകരമാണ്‌.

🗲 വീടിനു പുറത്താണങ്കിൽ വൃക്ഷങ്ങളുടെ ചുവട്ടിൽ നിൽക്കരുത്‌.

🗲 വാഹനത്തിനുള്ളിൽ ആണങ്കിൽ തുറസ്സായ സ്ഥലത്ത്‌ നിർത്തി, ലോഹ ഭാഗങ്ങളിൽ സ്പർശിക്കാതെ ഇരിക്കണം.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നൽ ഉണ്ടാകുമ്പോൾ ജലാശയത്തിൽ ഇറങ്ങുവാൻ പാടില്ല.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ള സമയം പുറത്ത്‌ അയയിൽ കിടക്കുന്ന നനഞ്ഞ വസ്ത്രങ്ങൾ എടുക്കാതിരിക്കുക.

🗲 ഇടിമിന്നലിൽനിന്ന് സുരക്ഷിതമാക്കാൻ കെട്ടിടങ്ങൾക്കു മുകളിൽ മിന്നൽ രക്ഷാ ചാലകം സ്ഥാപിക്കാം. 

🗲 വൈദ്യുതോപകരണങ്ങളുടെ സുരക്ഷക്കായി സർജ്ജ്‌ പ്രോട്ടക്ടര്‍ ഘടിപ്പിക്കാം.

🗲 വളര്‍ത്തു മൃഗങ്ങളെ തുറസായ സ്ഥലത്ത് ഈ സമയത്ത് കെട്ടരുത്. തുറസ്സായ സ്ഥലത്ത് കെട്ടിയവയെ ഇടിമിന്നലുള്ളപ്പോ മാറ്റിക്കെട്ടാനായി പുറത്തിറങ്ങരുത്. 

🗲 വാഹനങ്ങളിലുളളവര്‍ സുരക്ഷിതമായ സ്ഥലങ്ങള്‍ ലഭിക്കാത്തപക്ഷം വാഹനത്തിനുളളില്‍ തന്നെ ഇരിക്കണം. 

🗲  തുറസായ സ്ഥലത്താണെങ്കില്‍ പാദങ്ങള്‍ ചേര്‍ത്തുവച്ച് തല കാല്‍മുട്ടുകള്‍ക്കിടയില്‍ ഒതുക്കി ഉരുണ്ട രൂപത്തില്‍ ഇരിക്കുക. തറയില്‍ കിടക്കരുത്. 

🗲 മിന്നല്‍ ദൃശ്യമാകുന്നില്ലെങ്കില്‍പോലും ആകാശം മേഘാവൃതമാണെങ്കില്‍ സുരക്ഷാ നിര്‍ദേശങ്ങള്‍ പാലിക്കുക.

🗲 വൈദ്യുതി സംബന്ധമായ പരാതികൾക്ക് 1912 അല്ലെങ്കിൽ  0471 2555544 വിളിക്കുക. 9496001912 എന്ന വാട്സാപ്പ് നമ്പർ വഴിയും പരാതിപ്പെടാവുന്നതാണ്.

മിന്നലിന്റെ ആഘാതത്താൽ പൊള്ളൽ ഏൽക്കുകയോ കാഴ്ച്ചയോ കേൾവിയോ നഷ്ടമാവുകയോ ഹൃദയാഘാതം സംഭവിക്കയോ ചെയ്യാൻ സാധ്യതയുണ്ട് . മിന്നലാഘാതം ഏറ്റ ആളിന്റെ ശരീരത്തിൽ വൈദ്യുത പ്രവാഹം ഇല്ല എന്ന് മനസ്സിലാക്കണം. അതിനാൽ മിന്നലേറ്റ ആളിന്‌ പ്രഥമ ശുശ്രൂഷ നൽകുവാൻ മടിക്കരുത്‌. മിന്നൽ ഏറ്റാല്‍ ആദ്യ മുപ്പത്‌ സെക്കൻഡ് ജീവൻ രക്ഷിക്കാനുള്ള സുവർണ്ണ നിമിഷങ്ങളാണ്‌.

Gapa Basi, Lekhili Mu, Seithi
Bhanra ta, gunu gunu, Gaye jouthi

en.description:
Watch the Full Song of Hela Ki Prema an Odia Album. Hela Ki Prema Stars Sailendra Samantray, Jasmine Rath and Deepak. Hela Ki Prema is under the Banner of Amara Muzik. Produced by Naveen Bhandari, Directed by Smruti R and Music Directed by Asad Nizam. Amara Muzik is the official Music Label of Hela Ki Prema.

Song Credits:
Hela Ki Prema
Singer: Humane Sagar, Aseema Panda
Lyricist: Arun Mantri
Music Director: Asad Nizam
Flute : Abhiram Nanda
Percussion: Tula Bhai Manish Nanda
Guitar : Asad Nizam

Video Credits:
Director : Smruti R
Starring: Sailendra,Jasmine and Deepak
Executive Producer: Kabita Patra
DOP : Biswajit Kuldi
Lyrical Video: Nowshath Hussain
Editor : Chikun
Poster publicity: Sibajee
DI: Biswajeet Swain

Art Director: Nabaghana Dalai

Chaluni aaji mu chale bata
Duniya Laguchi mote choto
Kholuni aaji mu moro otha
Kiye se kejani gaye geeta
Akasha ta, mati sathe, mise jouthi 
Mana moro, haji gala, seithi
Sapana ku, Aakhi Basi, khoje jouthi
Nida Moro, Haji Gala, Seithi
Emiti hela mo, jibane Prathama
Kahi de, kahi de, hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kiye Dela mote chuin 
Nija bhitare mu nahi
Sabu kichi, lagila Mote bhala
Jani parilini Kehi, Ete Ranga Boli hei
Kete bele, futile ae, phula
Faguna ta, phula saathe, gape jouthi
Gapa Basi, Lekhili Mu, Seithi
Bhanra ta, gunu gunu, Gaye jouthi
Pada moro, nachi jaye, seithi
Emiti hela mo, jibane Prathama
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Nija Naa moro kahin, mane aaji padu nahi
Kehi jadi, pachare rahe tuni
Bhabe sina gote katha 
Kahe aau gote katha
Kala ae, hrudaya beimani
Hrudaya ta, chati tale, thaye jouthi
Lucheili, tate nei, seithe
Bhabana ta, hei jaye, sata jouthi
Mote Khoji, paili mu, seithi
 Emiti hela mo Jibane Prathama
Kahi de kahi de hala ki prema
Kahi De kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema
Kahi de kahi de hela ki prema

snippet.title: Paatashaala - Yuvarathnaa(Kannada Video Song) | Puneeth Rajkumar | Santhosh Ananddram |Vijay Prakash
snippet.description:
Presenting 'PAATASHAALA', Full Video song, from Puneeth Rajkumar's Blockbuster Kannada film 'Yuvarathnaa', Directed by Santhosh Ananddram, Music by Thaman S, Produced by Vijay Kiragandur under Hombale Films. 

Visit 'Paatasala', and reminisce the place, that has laid out a foundation, for your today. With latest Kannada songs by Thaman S, as expressive and stirring, built with a large number of musicians and their instruments. 
The richness in this Kannada music shall remind you of your roots, unforgotten. 

If this isn't plenty enough? Subscribe to Hombale Films YouTube Channel for viewing many more of such Kannada new songs and videos. 
http://bit.ly/SubscribetoHombaleFilms

Song Details:
Song Name : Paatashaala
Singer : Vijay Prakash
Lyricist : Santhosh Ananddram
Music Director : Thaman S

snippet.title: Chal Uthh (चल उठ) | CA Anthem - Motivational Rap | Edu91 Ft. Kunal Singhani #CAAnthem #MyDreamCA
snippet.description:
#ChalUthh #MainBhiCA #MyDreamCA

This is dedicated to all the CA students! I know the times are tough, the situation has got completely out of hand, but now is the time to exercise EXTREME focus, calm, and perseverance.

Let's stay united with each other in this fight against the pandemic and prepare hard for our ultimate dream of becoming a CA

Good luck! Stay safe, take care of your health and the safety of your loved ones. We will meet again very soon when we all come out of this STRONGER and more RESILIENT!

Till then.. Seekhte rahey kyunki.. SEEKHNA bandh toh JEETNA bandh!

This video is powered by: https://www.edu91.org

Check Out Kunal's YT Channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9htEemZ1BXuTzU7xOTIaBg/

****************************

Lyrics:
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Chun li tune CA toh fir mehnat se kya darna
Padh le poori shiddat se fir jo bhi marzi karna
Ek baar padhne baith gaya toh itna saara padhna
k untaalis chaar bhi kaanpe aur na dena pade dharna

Warna jeene ni denge poochenge
Sab wo rishtedaar
Jinke khud k bacche paani mein milaake peete chaar

Par tu wo banda hai
Jisne na maani hai kabhie haar
Kamra band, phone side
Gussa paper pe nikaal
Aur 
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Na ismein Reservation chalti hai aur na hi Rishwat

bahaut priceless si cheez hai ye.. 

Ek heere ko chota banade itna keemti ye
launde karna chahte club mein party tera dream CA
langar ni lagra yahan pe tu jaake apna cheen CA
classes bhi ghar aa gayi par nawaab sahab ko neend chahiye

Uth k baith..aur  chup chaap padh, book ko khol
Jab lage k mujhse ho ni ra toh bhai tu khud ko bol
main toh kar lunga.. kar lunga main
apna khud ka ghar lunga main
maa ki dikkat sar lunga main
jo bhi ho jaaye padh lunga main
kaisa bhi aa jaaye paper
poora 116 bhar dunga main
CA ki degree lekar
apna sapna poora kar dunga main
100 pratishat dekar
bilkul chill fir result day par
jaise dhoni har one-day par
apna Monday, Sunday kar dunga main
jab sab pata hai toh fir padh le, ab tu dheeth na bann
"Naa" kehna seekh le, bekar mein itna sweet na bann
Aur jab lag jaaye
naam k aage dono akshar
tab cheekna par seekhte rehna
kyunki SEEKHNA BAND TOH JEETNA BAND

****************************

Rolling Credits

CAST AND CREW:
Abhinav Singh, Abhishek, Abhishek Pandey, Adarsh Jaiswal, Ajay Sharma, Akshay Kumar Jha, Aman, Aman Mishra, Anu, Ashish Dubey, Bharat Bhushan, Hema Mukherjee, Jaggan, Junaid, Kamni, Kunal Jai Singhani, Lalit Chauhan, Maurya Agarwal, Mohit Gupta, Narabh Shah, Neeraj Arora, Nidhi, Nikunj Goyal, Pooja Gupta, Pooja Sharma, Prajat Singh, Prajjwal Soni, Prateeksha, Pratham Raheja, Renu, Sarthak Goyal, Shivangi, Shivansh, Shubham Mittal, Sidhanth Rajput, Subhash Ray, Sunil, Vikas Singla, Vrinda Chugh

Songwriter & Singer: Kunal Jai Singhani

Music Credits: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WbY9LxGkPyY 

Vocals Recorded by and at: Shubham Mittal at Artoday Studio - Delhi

Mixed and Mastered by: Shubham Mittal

VIDEO CREW:
Director: Utkarsh Bharat
1st Assistant Director: Shubham Mittal

Director of Photography (DOP): DD Verma

2nd unit DOP: Sanjay Kumar Jena

Editor: Shubham Mittal

Lightman: Parmendar Kumar Shah, Amit Yadav

Camera Assistant/ Focus Puller: Gaurav Rawat

Location  
Day 1 - (Sharma Niwas Girls PG): S/87 school block Shakarpur 

Day 2 - (AVJ House Boys PG): S 452A school block Shakarpur 

MARKETING AND PROMOTIONS:
Pooja Sharma, Vrinda Chugh, Neeraj Arora, Dheeraj Thukral, Shubham Mittal, Kunal Jai Singhani, Divya Garg

hi.title: Chal Uthh (चल उठ) | CA Anthem - Motivational Rap | Edu91 Ft. Kunal Singhani #CAAnthem #MyDreamCA
hi.description:
#ChalUthh #MainBhiCA #MyDreamCA

This is dedicated to all the CA students! I know the times are tough, the situation has got completely out of hand, but now is the time to exercise EXTREME focus, calm, and perseverance.

Let's stay united with each other in this fight against the pandemic and prepare hard for our ultimate dream of becoming a CA

Good luck! Stay safe, take care of your health and the safety of your loved ones. We will meet again very soon when we all come out of this STRONGER and more RESILIENT!

Till then.. Seekhte rahey kyunki.. SEEKHNA bandh toh JEETNA bandh!

This video is powered by: https://www.edu91.org

Check Out Kunal's YT Channel - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9htEemZ1BXuTzU7xOTIaBg/

****************************

Lyrics:
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Chun li tune CA toh fir mehnat se kya darna
Padh le poori shiddat se fir jo bhi marzi karna
Ek baar padhne baith gaya toh itna saara padhna
k untaalis chaar bhi kaanpe aur na dena pade dharna

Warna jeene ni denge poochenge
Sab wo rishtedaar
Jinke khud k bacche paani mein milaake peete chaar

Par tu wo banda hai
Jisne na maani hai kabhie haar
Kamra band, phone side
Gussa paper pe nikaal
Aur 
Chal uth beta bistar toh chhod
tere sapne aage bhaag rahe zara tu bhi peeche daud 
chal utth la la bistar to chhod
Arjun ki aankhon se dekh tu apna
CA vaala goal
Chal uth na

aaj apne aap ko thoda push kar
shaitaan ko chhod aaj bhagwan ko thoda khush kar
jeetega padhayi ki ladayi jo tune chedi warna
kaise dekhega khud ko khud ki aankhon mein ghuskar

Na ismein Reservation chalti hai aur na hi Rishwat

bahaut priceless si cheez hai ye.. 

Ek heere ko chota banade itna keemti ye
launde karna chahte club mein party tera dream CA
langar ni lagra yahan pe tu jaake apna cheen CA
classes bhi ghar aa gayi par nawaab sahab ko neend chahiye

Uth k baith..aur  chup chaap padh, book ko khol
Jab lage k mujhse ho ni ra toh bhai tu khud ko bol
main toh kar lunga.. kar lunga main
apna khud ka ghar lunga main
maa ki dikkat sar lunga main
jo bhi ho jaaye padh lunga main
kaisa bhi aa jaaye paper
poora 116 bhar dunga main
CA ki degree lekar
apna sapna poora kar dunga main
100 pratishat dekar
bilkul chill fir result day par
jaise dhoni har one-day par
apna Monday, Sunday kar dunga main
jab sab pata hai toh fir padh le, ab tu dheeth na bann
"Naa" kehna seekh le, bekar mein itna sweet na bann
Aur jab lag jaaye
naam k aage dono akshar
tab cheekna par seekhte rehna
kyunki SEEKHNA BAND TOH JEETNA BAND

****************************

snippet.title: As Modi govt faces up to Covid disaster, BJP learns a tough truth — the virus doesn’t vote
snippet.description:
#NationalInterest #CovidVaccines #Modi
Till February this year, Narendra Modi and the BJP were congratulating themselves on having avoided the tsunami of Covid. In this episode of #NationalInterest, Shekhar Gupta explains the three instances of change that made Modi realise a tough truth — the virus doesn’t vote.
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Read Shekhar Gupta's column here: https://theprint.in/national-interest/as-modi-govt-faces-up-to-covid-disaster-bjp-learns-a-tough-truth-the-virus-doesnt-vote/644949/

How To Beat Your Addiction?
How To Quit Any Addiction?
नमस्ते दोस्तों!
The Ranveer Show हिंदी के 31st Episode में आप सभी का स्वागत है। आज के Podcast में हम बात करेंगे Addictions की। हम सभी जानते हैं कि कोई भी चीज़ Limit में लो तो Medicine और Addiction की तरह लो तो Poison बन जाती है। आज के समय में 46% से भी ज़्यादा भारतीय अलग-अलग तरह के Substance Abuse का शिकार हैं और 80% से भी ज़्यादा लोगों के Suicide करने का Reason होता है Substance Abuse. ऐसे में क्या Substance Abuse Safe है? क्या लोगों को Alcohol, Drugs, जैसी चीज़ों का इस्तेमाल करना चाहिए?
एक समय की बात है जब मैं भी Substance Abuse का शिकार हो चुका था। 
जानिए कैसे अलग-अलग Addictions ने मेरे Career, Relationships, Exams, Business और Creativity पर असर किया और कैसे मैं एक Addict से Teetotaller बना। 
ऐसे में कैसे मैंने इनका सामना किया और अपने Addictions को Overcome करके अपने Motivation को Restore किया जानने के लिए इस खास Addiction Motivation Podcast को आखिर तक ज़रूर देखें सिर्फ और सिर्फ आपके Favourite BeerBiceps Hindi Channel Ranveer Allahbadia पर।

#addiction #alcohol

Ranveer Allahbadia एक Self Improvement और Self Help Channel है।
हमने Channel की शुरुआत Fitness और Health Videos से की थी।
फिर धीरे-धीरे हमने Fashion, Grooming, Personal Finance, Etiquette, Meditation, Mental Health, Communication Skills और Entrepreneurship जैसे Topics पर भी ढ़ेर सारे Videos बनाए।

आज Ranveer Allahbadia Channel पर नए भारत का नया Podcast The Ranveer Show हिंदी या TRS हिंदी भी Available है।

Entrepreneurs हो या Bollywood Stars से लेकर Athletes तक हर कोई हमारे Podcast का हिस्सा रह चुका है। हमारे Podcast का हर एक Conversation आपको देगा Extreme Learning Experience.

snippet.title: Pinjara Khubsurti Ka | पिंजरा खुबसूरती का | Episode 175 | Coming Up Next
snippet.description:
Omkar is left puzzled and shocked at the same time when his factory and other properties get sealed one after the other. Watch the sneak peek of the upcoming episode.
#ColorsTV #PinjaraKhubsurtiKa

To subscribe this channel go to: http://www.youtube.com/subscription_center?add_user=colorstv

To download the Voot app please click on the link :
IOS: https://apps.apple.com/in/app/voot/id1011777157
Android: https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.tv.v18.viola
Fire TV: https://www.amazon.in/Viacom18-Media-Pvt-Ltd-Originals/dp/B01N2PCGG3/ref=sr_1_1?dchild=1&keywords=voot+tv&qid=1595417708&s=mobile-apps&sr=1-1

Follow us on: 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/ColorsTV
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/colorstv/

Mayura is the epitome of beauty, grace and intelligence, but the world only sees her beauty. Trapped in a cage by a society that judges by looks, Mayura yearns for her freedom to fly free. What happens to her fight for individuality when she ends up in a marriage with Omkar, a control freak obsessed with her beauty? Will he ever see his wife beyond her physical form? Will Mayura ever fulfil her own dreams? Or will she remain trapped in her beautiful pinjaraa for life?

Set against the backdrop of culturally rich and vibrant Punjab, Shakti-Astitva Ke Ehsaas Ki portrays the power of a family to dictate the fate of its daughters, Soumya and Surbhi. Deprived of an education, companions and toys, Soumya can't understand the indifference her father and Dadi show towards her and finds solace only in her mother's arms. Meanwhile Surbhi gets everything she wants, except for the one thing she yearns for-her mother's love. What has caused these heart-breaking rifts in this otherwise perfect family? What makes parents discriminate between their own daughters? Watch the mystery unfold.

snippet.title: Nayantara - Full Episode | 22 April 2021 | Sun Bangla TV Serial | Bengali Serial
snippet.description:
Watch the Full Episode of the bengali serial "Nayantara" which airs on Sun Bangla TV.

Nayantara: After 10 years of marriage, Adidev (Gourab Mondal) and Averi (Payal De) are about to experience parenthood with the birth of their first child. The doctor warns Avery that she might face life threatening complications if she decides to go ahead with the child birth. Averi does not tell Adidev about this because she wants to give him the happiness of fatherhood and be a mother herself. On the other hand, Avery means the world to Adidev, so he will definitely chose her life over the child. Avery gives birth to Tara (Hiya Mukherjee). Avery dies within a few minutes of Tara’s birth. The doctor informs Adidev that he had warned Avery but she did not listen. Adidev, who was already devastated by his wife's death, comes to know that the Income Tax Department had raided his office. Adidev starts to believe that Tara is the source of the misfortune in his life and hatred grows in his heart for Tara. On the other hand, Adidev's second wife Madhuja (Swarnakamal) loves Tara more than her own daughter Preeti. But Adideb can’t tolerate that either. Tara's only wish, will she ever get his father's affection?

snippet.description:

--------------
In this Madan Gowri video, we will be discussing the oxygen politics happening currently In India. The high court of India has given some strict statements about how the virus should be controlled in India. And how beds and oxygen supply should be fixed, in states like Maharashtra, Tamil Nadu, Kerala, Karnataka, Andhra, and Delhi.

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 904 | 22nd April, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 904: The Milk Misery
------------------------------------
 Jetha rushes to a nearby milk shop. He stands there in a queue and when his turn comes, there is no milk in the container. As Jetha gets upset the seller says that he can get the milk in five minutes. But when Jetha gets the milk he realizes he does not have the money. The seller says that he can't take the milk without paying. So, then he calls Abdul with money, and both return to Gokuldham.
 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

Welcome To Class 11th : https://youtu.be/A1JdXKKKOwc
Complete Class 11th NCERT Syllabus + JEE/NEET Preparation . 🎯

Batch Exclusive on PW APP(http://bit.ly/3ru9Agh)

🔴 Details About The Batch.

✒️ We will cover PCM/PCB for Class 11 and JEE/NEET

✒️  Complete LIVE CLASSES of each subject(Arjunaas can see recorded lecture if He/She misses the Live Class).
⚛️ JEE Lecture Plan:https://bit.ly/3sNOyci

🌀 NEET Lecture Plan:https://bit.ly/3dJ2EHA


✒️ Study Materials that will boost up your preparation. It includes complete detailed theory and level wise exercises ( Hard Copy of the study material will be delivered at your home ).

✒️ Daily Practice Problems and Detailed Video Solutions of DPP will be provided.

✒️ Special Classes after each chapter completion with NCERT Discussion and Practice Problem Sessions.

✒️ Incase you missed the live class you can see its recording any number of times.

✒️ PDF Notes of each Class .

✒️ Test after every 21 days to help students improve their problem solving skills. It includes Part Test + Full Test
🔘 JEE TEST SCHEDULE :https://bit.ly/3tMJtSU
🔘 NEET TEST SCHEDULE :https://bit.ly/3nfR8Xn


✒️ Syllabus Completion by the end of the January 2022 with topic-wise discussion of last 10 year problems of JEE/NEET

✒️ The complete course will be accessible to all the student until JEE/NEET 2023

--------------------------------------------------
🔴 OFFLINE KA FEEL!!!

•Printed Study Material for Arjuna JEE/NEET Package ( You can order on Physics Wallah App)
ClassXI-JEE Study Material Sample:
Physics:https://bit.ly/3xpgkzs

Mathematics:https://bit.ly/3gO9QUX

Class XI-NEET Study Material Sample:
Physics:https://bit.ly/3aBqRO4
Chemistry:https://bit.ly/2Phozw0
Biology:https://bit.ly/3gBAm3B

1) Package contains a total of 15 books. Each subject (PCM/PCB) will be having 4 modules and one solution booklet (100% solutions of all problems).

2) Detailed and catchy theory of each chapter with illustrative examples helping students in concept building.

3) Critical topics are highlighted in the book for keeping them in the spotlight.

4) Extra key points are mentioned in the book which gives a competitive edge over other books.

5) Books consist of MCQs of different levels of difficulty to enhance problem solving techniques.

6) Detailed answers for every question for better understanding.

7) Tips and tricks for speed and skill enhancement of students.

📝For more Details, Visit PhysicsWallah App(http://bit.ly/3ru9Agh)

snippet.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता का उल्टा चश्मा | Episode 906 | 24th April, 2021
snippet.description:
Subscribe to Sony Pal: http://www.youtube.com/sonypalindia

Episode 906: The Business Competitor
------------------------------------
 A man comes to Bhide's house asking after his Papad business. Very enthusiastically they show him all the Papads they sell. Finally, after listening to all the details the man reveals to them that he simply came there to know the rates of the Papads for the business his daughter has started.
 
About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble for all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalaal.
tags: Tarak Mehta ka ooltah chashmah funniest episode ever

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. snippet.description:
ನಾನು ನನ್ನ ಕಣ್ಣಾರೆ ಕೊರೊನಾ ನರಕವನ್ನು ಕಂಡಿದ್ದೇನೆ, ಬೇರೆ ಯಾರಿಗೂ ಇಂಥ ಪರಿಸ್ಥಿತಿ ಬರಬಾರದು!

ಕೊರೊನಾ ಕರಾಳ ಕಥೆ ಬಿಚ್ಚಿಟ್ಟ ಕಿರುತೆರೆ ಕಲಾವಿದ ಪವನ್ ತನ್ನ ಭಾವ ಮತ್ತು ತಂದೆಯನ್ನ ಕಳೆದುಕೊಂಡಿರುವ ಬಗ್ಗೆ ಕಣ್ಣೀರು ಹಾಕಿದ್ದಾರೆ. 2 ದಿನದ ಅಂತರದಲ್ಲಿ ನನ್ನ ಭಾವ, ತಂದೆ ಕಳೆದುಕೊಂಡಿದ್ದೇನೆ. ಸೂಕ್ತ ಚಿಕಿತ್ಸೆ ಸಿಗದೇ ಇಬ್ಬರೂ ಕೊನೆಯುಸಿರೆಳೆದಿದ್ದಾರೆ. ಯಾರಿಗೂ ಈ ಸ್ಥಿತಿ ಬರಬಾರದು ಎಂದು ಪವನ್ ಕಣ್ಣೀರು ಹಾಕಿದ್ದಾರೆ.

snippet.title: Watch: Indian Air Force transports oxygen tanks to hospitals across India
snippet.description:
As reports of oxygen shortage continue to pour in from hospitals across the, the government has now pressed the Indian Air Force into service. The AIF has been transporting medical personnel, critical equipment and medicines to COVID-19 hospitals and facilities across the country. The Indian Air Force also tweeted to confirm that C-17 and IL-76 aircraft airlifted cryogenic oxygen containers from Air Force Station Hindan to Panagarh for recharging and added that similar tasks are being undertaken across the country. Earlier, defence minister Rajnath Singh had held a meeting with three service chiefs and ordered them to allow use of defence facilities to treat civilian Covid patients. Watch the full video for all the details.

Lyrics -
Jab dekhya pehli baar tere te pyar tere te ho gaya re,
Yo toot na jave sapna sa yo soch ferrer te te so gaya re,
Main khud sapne mein kho gaya re mane bera na ke ho gaya re,
Location teri bhardi oye aur tere pyar ka root liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

O kit re tu aayi hai aur kit si tane jaana se,
Debate chalegi tere pe ib shuru kiya se gaana se,
Abhiyaan search tera jaari hai tane galti kardi bhaari se,
Ib chaapa padna tere pe kara Janhit bheta jari se,
Oye haani karak zehar tera aur galti te maine ghoot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya,

Tu paue jitni dikikhan mein or bottle barga asar tera,
Re samajh kise ke aaya na isa kar diya se yo hashar mera,
Nu aage pache bohot ghani par dil tere pe aaya se,
Akhand taareef ki patar tu jab geet tere pe gaya hai,
Baaki to sab moh-maya se aur sabka bhanda foot liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya, 

Oye yaar tera full paapi hai na duji koi copy se,
Mai ek ekla antique su ya news aa ne bhi chaapi hai,
Re Dil te Dhanyawad karu meri zindagi mein jo aayi tu,
Ya saare raaji ho jange banja inki bharjayi tu,
Chal chhod jeans or top tera ja Mere naam ka suit liya,

Oye Loot liya re loot liya oye din dhole tane loot liya,
Oye tu chambal ki daaku se tane din dhole main loot liya, Loot liya loot liya.

snippet.title: फक्त दूध वापरून बनवा एकदम क्रिमी आईसक्रिम | 4 types of IceCream with milk | No Cream |MadhurasRecipe
snippet.description:
#4typesIceCream #IceCreamRecipe #MadhurasRecipe

४ प्रकारचे आईस्क्रीम बनवण्यासाठी लागणारे साहित्य 
• १ १/२ लिटर दूध 
• १/२ कप साखर 
• ३ चमचे कॉर्न फ्लोअर 
• १/२ चमचा G.M.S. पावडर (ऐच्छिक)
• २ चमचे दूध 
ड्राय फ्रुट आईस्क्रीमसाठी 
• ४~५ बदाम 
• ४~५ काजू 
• २~३ थेंब केशर इसेन्स 
• खायचा पिवळा रंग (ऐच्छिक)
• काही पिस्त्याचे काप 
• काही बदामाचे काप 
पान आईस्क्रीमसाठी
• १ चमचा बडीशेप 
• थोडीशी वेलची पूड 
• १ चमचा गुलकंद 
• ५ खायची पानं

किंवा ९१३६८२२२२४ या नंबर वर व्हॉटसऍप मेसेज करा  

मधुराज रेसिपी मसाले ऑर्डर कसे करायचे यासाठी हा विडिओ पहा
https://youtu.be/9Db_owqWJe4

Summer is on. So ice cream recipe is must. We already have seen few ice cream recipes. But in this recipe we are not using any cream, whipped cream or fresh cream, not even condensed milk or milk powder. You can make these ice creams easily with the ingredients easily available in your kitchen. These ice creams turn out really nice and tasty. This is a very easy and simple recipe. You can try this recipe at home and drop a comment for me. Do not forget to like, share and subscribe.

Ingredients:
• 1 1/2 litre full cream Milk
• 1/2 cup Sugar
• 3 tsp Corn flour
• 1/2 tsp G.M.S. powder (Optional)
• 2 tsp Milk 
For Dry Fruit Ice Cream
• 4~5 Almonds
• 4~5 Cashew nuts
• 2~3 drops Saffron essence
• Yellow food color (Optional)
• Few Pistachios slices
• Few Almonds slices
For Paan Ice Cream
• 1 tsp Fennel seeds
• Cardamom powder
• 1 tsp Gulkand
• 5 Betel leaves
• 2~3 tsp Khas syrup
• Few Tutti frutti
For Chocolate Ice Cream
• 2 tsp Cocoa powder
• A little Chocolate syrup
For Mango Ice Cream
• Mango pulp
• Chopped Mango
• Few Pistachios slices

Method:
• Heat up milk in a pan. 
• When milk begins to boil add sugar and mix well. 
• Take corn flour in a bowl and add G.M.S powder. 
• Adding G.M.S. powder is optional. You can skip it if you don’t want. 
• Add milk to make slurry and add this slurry into the boiling milk. 
• Mix well and boil well until the mixture thickens up really good for about 10 minutes. 
• Turn off the gas and let the mixture cool down completely. 
• Blend the mixture well with hand blender. 
• You can blend the mixture in mixer too. 
• Transfer the mixture into a plastic container and close the lid. 
• Transfer the container into freezer to set overnight. 
• Ice cream base is ready. 
• Take the container out of the freezer and rest it for about 10 minutes. 
• When the base softens a little cut it into pieces.

snippet.title: पानी ने किया Jethalal को परेशान -Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah-तारक मेहता-Ep 3151-23rd April, 2021
snippet.description:
Click here to watch the full episode of Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
https://www.sonyliv.com/shows/taarak-mehta-ka-ooltah-chashmah-1700000084/the-troubled-bhide-1000116221?

Click here to subscribe to SAB TV: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC6-F5tO8uklgE9Zy8IvbdFw?sub_confirmation=1

Click here to subscribe to SonyLIV: http://www.sonyliv.com/signin

Episode 3151 : Will Jethalal Water Problem Be Solved?
---------------------------------------------------------
Bhide is already tensed about his online classes while he is unable to find his file. Jethalal calls Bhide and informs him that there is a shortage of water at his home while the problem is faced by nobody. Will Jethalal's problem be solved? Watch the full episode to find out.

More Useful Links :
 * Visit us at : http://www.sonyliv.com
 * Like us on Facebook : http://www.facebook.com/SonyLIV
 * Follow us on Twitter : http://www.twitter.com/SonyLIV
Also get Sony LIV app on your mobile
 * Google Play - https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.msmpl.livsportsphone
 * ITunes - https://itunes.apple.com/us/app/liv-sports/id879341352?ls=1&mt=8

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
----------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired by the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story evolves around happenings in """"Gokuldham Co-operative Society"""" and covers topical issues that are socially relevant. The show predominantly - Promoolves around 'Jethalaal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Sailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalaal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalaal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises.

snippet.title: COVID Home Treatment | Oxygen Procedure | Remdesivir vs Other Medicines | Dhruv Rathee
snippet.description:
What can you do if all the hospital beds are full and you cannot find a place? You might be forced to do COVID-19 treatment at home for your family / relatives who are suffering from Coronavirus. In this video, I explain the step by step procedure of home isolation treatment for COVID-19. Which steroids can you use for treatment and which ones like Remdesivir to avoid? What are the most effective techniques to increase your oxygen saturation?

All the information in this video has been compiled by a team of professional doctors based in Vellore. I still highly recommend that you consult a doctor / nurse at least once before implementing the techniques mentioned in this video since your previous health conditions may cause undesired side effects from some steroids. Although this information is up to date with the best of current knowledge, apply this in your home at your own risk.

Day 1 to 3: 14th March - 16th March 2020
Day 4 to 9: 20th April - 25th April 2021

(Morari Bapu’s Ram Katha in Rajula had been postponed after Day 3 in 2020 due to the coronavirus pandemic)

Katha Chaupai:

पुनि मंदिर महँ बात जनाई । आवत नगर कुसल रघुराई ॥
puni mandir maha baat janaai | aavat nagar kusal raghuraai ||

Uttar Kand - Doha 3

kripasindhu jab mandir gae | pur nar naari sukhi sab bhae ||

snippet.title: Why Should Straight Couples Have all the Trouble?
snippet.description:
Since the beginning of time, lovers have had to struggle to let their love be recognized by either their family or the society- whether it was Romeo and Juliet or Heer and Ranjha. In our new video we ask a very important question- while we have recognized and glorified straight love stories, what about love between people of the same gender? Isn't it time to give same-sex relationships the same recognition? In this video we look at one such same-sex couple looking for recognition of their relationship but in their own humorous way.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3151 - Jethalal Visits Bhide's House! | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi

About Puthiya Thalaimurai TV

 Puthiya Thalaimurai TV (Tamil: புதிய தலைமுறை டிவி) is a 24x7 live news channel in Tamil launched on August 24, 2011.Due to its independent editorial stance it became extremely popular in India and abroad within days of its launch and continues to remain so till date.The channel looks at issues through the eyes of the common man and serves as a platform that airs people's views.The editorial policy is built on strong ethics and fair reporting methods that does not favour or oppose any individual, ideology, group, government, organisation or sponsor.The channel’s primary aim is taking unbiased and accurate information to the socially conscious common man.
 
Besides giving live and current information the channel broadcasts news on sports,  business and international affairs. It also offers a wide array of week end programmes.
 
The channel is promoted by Chennai based New Gen Media Corporation. The company also publishes popular Tamil magazines- Puthiya Thalaimurai and Kalvi.

snippet.title: NEW! Ep 3148 - Iyer Ke Mobile Pe Gira Mango Milkshake | Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah | तारक मेहता
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah Official Channel: https://www.youtube.com/taarakmehtakaooltahchashmah?sub_confirmation=1 

Click here to watch all your favorite Episode videos: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=gqFEadNxmd8&list=PLPbh-P_C0BzRYOkpGxKL-6QmvYSL_ZuCu 

We bring to you the best videos from your favorite show Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah. So, get your daily dose of laughter with Jethalal, Taarak Mehta, Daya, Champaklal and their neighbors in Gokuldham Society.

About Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah:
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The show is inspired from the famous humorous column 'Duniya Ne Undha Chasma' written by the eminent Gujarati writer Mr. Tarak Mehta. This story revolves around daily happenings in "Gokuldham Co-operative Society" and covers topical issues which are socially relevant. The show predominantly - revolves around 'Jethalal' (Dilip Joshi) who is an uneducated Gujarati businessman. Your 'Taarak Mehta' (Shailesh Lodha), is his neighbor. 'Jethalal' finds a friend and philosopher in 'Taarak Mehta' and often goes to him for advice whenever he is in trouble. Jethalaal's family includes his simpleton wife 'Daya Ben' (Disha Wakani) and a mischievous son 'Tapu' (Bhavya Gandhi / Raj Anadkat). Tapu is a menace and a constant source of trouble to all the members of Gokuldham. They have often warned 'Jethalal' to reform 'Tapu' or else be prepared to leave the premises. Lost hopes of being heard by his son push Jethalaal' to call his father 'Champaklal' (Amit Bhatt) from the village. This was his great idea of leashing some control over the mischievous Tapu. The opposite happens and the grandfather joins hands with the grandson to make life a roller coaster troublesome ride for Jethalal.

Cast:
---------
Dilip Joshi as Jethalal Champaklal Gada
Disha Vakani as Daya Jethalal Gada
Raj Anadkat / Bhavya Gandhi as Tipendra Jethalal Gada (Tapu) 
Amit Bhatt as Champaklal Jayantilal Gada
Shailesh Lodha as Taarak Mehta
Neha Mehta as Anjali Taarak Mehta
Tanuj Mahashabde as Krishnan Subramaniam Iyer
Munmun Dutta as Babita Krishnan Iyer
Mandar Chandwadkar as Aatmaram Tukaram Bhide
Sonalika Joshi as Madhvi Aatmaram Bhide
Nidhi Bhanushali / Palak Sidhwani as Sonalika Aatmaram Bhide (Sonu) 
Gurucharan Singh/ Balwinder suri as Roshan Singh Harjeet Singh Sodhi
Jennifer Mistry Bansiwal as Roshan Kaur Roshan Singh Sodhi
Kavi Kumar Azad / Nirmal Soni as Dr. Hansraj Hathi 
Ambika Ranjankar as Komal Hansraj Hathi
Kush Shah as Gulabkumar Hansraj Hathi (Goli)
Shyam Pathak as Popatlal Pandey
Sharad Sankla as Abdul
Azhar Shaikh as Pinku 

Produced By: Neela Asit Modi, Asit Kumarr Modi 
Special Thanks: Mahesh Vakil, Indu Tarak Mehta
Set Design: Jayant Deshmukh
On-Air Promotion  ( SAB): SAB OAP
Costume Designer: Alka Mehta
Costume Stylist: Ekta Brahmbhatt
Sound Recordist: Shakeel Mansuri 
Cameraman: Aamir Virani
Production Head: Arvind Marchande
Production Controler: Vinod Shishupal
Background Music: Sunil Patni
Online Editors: Vishal Tambe, Sandeep Singh 
Executive Producer: Jatin Yogesh Bajaj
Editor: Dinesh Gosavi, Kaushal Mistry, Devang Modi, Vinod Maurya
Creative Supervision: Krunal Khakhkhar
Operation Head: Sohil Ramani

Directors: Harshad Joshi, Malav Suresh Rajda

Television Adaptation and Designed By: Asit Kumarr Modi
